# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy_staging
  - deploy_production

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: "30"
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: '.secure_files'

build_application:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
  script:
    - npm ci --only=production
    - npm run build
    - mkdir -p build/binaries
    - mkdir -p build/configs
    - cp -r dist/* build/binaries/
    - cp package.json build/configs/
    - cp package-lock.json build/configs/
    - echo "BUILD_VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" > build/configs/version.txt
    - sha256sum build/binaries/* > build/checksums.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "application-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build/configs/version.txt
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/
  tags:
    - docker

build_backend:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git ca-certificates
  script:
    - go mod download
    - go mod verify
    - CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -ldflags="-w -s -X main.version=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" -o backend-binary ./cmd/server
    - mkdir -p build/backend
    - mv backend-binary build/backend/
    - cp config.yaml build/backend/
    - sha256sum build/backend/backend-binary > build/backend/checksum.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "backend-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - build/backend/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/
  tags:
    - docker

verify_artifacts:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache coreutils
  script:
    - echo "Verifying application artifacts..."
    - cd build
    - sha256sum -c checksums.txt
    - echo "Verifying backend artifacts..."
    - cd backend
    - sha256sum -c checksum.txt
    - cd ../..
    - echo "All artifact checksums verified successfully"
    - ls -lah build/
    - ls -lah build/backend/
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_backend
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/
  tags:
    - docker

security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: aquasec/trivy:latest
  script:
    - trivy fs --exit-code 0 --no-progress --severity HIGH,CRITICAL build/
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_backend
  allow_failure: true
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_STAGING" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $STAGING_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - cd build/backend
    - sha256sum -c checksum.txt
    - cd ../..
    - rsync -avz --delete build/ $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER:/opt/app/
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "chmod +x /opt/app/backend/backend-binary"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "sudo systemctl restart app-service"
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_backend
    - verify_artifacts
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: stop_staging
  only:
    - develop
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker

stop_staging:
  stage: deploy_staging
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_STAGING" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $STAGING_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "sudo systemctl stop app-service"
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - develop
  tags:
    - docker

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PRODUCTION" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $PRODUCTION_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - cd build/backend
    - sha256sum -c checksum.txt
    - cd ../..
    - cat build/configs/version.txt
    - rsync -avz --delete build/ $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER:/opt/app/
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "chmod +x /opt/app/backend/backend-binary"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "sudo systemctl restart app-service"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "sudo systemctl status app-service"
    - echo "Deployment to production completed"
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_backend
    - verify_artifacts
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  tags:
    - docker

archive_artifacts:
  stage: deploy_production
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache tar gzip
  script:
    - tar -czf artifacts-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz build/
    - echo "Artifacts archived successfully"
    - ls -lh artifacts-*.tar.gz
  artifacts:
    name: "archive-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - artifacts-*.tar.gz
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - build_backend
  only:
    - main
  tags:
    - docker
